properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v11

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: My heart a storm, clouds raging deep within The Prince of peace came bursting through the wind The violent sky held its breath And in Your light I found rest

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Tearing through the night Riding on the storm Staring down the fight My eyes found Yours Shining like the sun Striding through my fear The Prince of peace met me there You heard my prayer

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Hope like the sunlight piercing through the dark The Prince of peace came and broke into my heart The violent cross, the empty grave And in Your light I found grace

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Tearing through the night Riding on the storm Staring down the fight My eyes found Yours Shining like the sun Striding through my fear The Prince of peace met me there You're always there And You hear my prayer

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Your love surrounds me when my thoughts wage war When night screams terror, there Your voice will roar Come death or shadow, God I know Your light will meet me there

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: When fear comes knocking, there You'll be my guard When day breeds trouble, there You'll hold my heart Come storm or battle, God I know Your peace will meet me there

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Again and again Oh, be still my heart I know that You are God

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Oh, fear no evil For I know You are here

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: And my soul will know Your love surrounds me when my thoughts wage war When night screams terror, there Your voice will roar Come death or shadow, God I know Your light will meet me there

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: And my soul will know When fear comes knocking, there You'll be my guard When day breeds trouble, there You'll hold my heart Come storm or battle, God I know Your peace will meet me there

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: Oh, be still my heart And my soul will ever know that You are God And You heard my prayer
